title: satureja annua
intro: Satureja annua, also known as annual savory, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, purple flowers and needle-like leaves. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Satureja annua include alleviating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and fighting off infections, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Satureja annua can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in cooking and as a flavoring agent due to its pungent and aromatic flavor.
